## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content marketing progress and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic growth: 40%+ jump, with state-by-state hygienist blog driving 60% of increase](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Focus shift: Emphasize conversion optimization for high-traffic articles](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Opportunity: Explore content ideas based on hygienists' aspirational needs/wants](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Action needed: Implement conversion panels on blog posts for both hygienists and dental offices](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [40%+ traffic jump week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [State-by-state hygienist blog: major driver (60% of increase)](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Multiple blogs (5-20 range) seeing 50%+ traffic jumps](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Keyword positions improving overall (moving up 1-2 spots)](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Healthy positive signals from entire content library](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### Conversion Optimization Focus

  - [Shift focus to conversion for high-traffic articles (e.g., 180+ clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Add and test CTAs on existing high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Need to implement conversion panels on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Differentiate CTAs for hygienists vs. dental offices](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Current bottom-of-page CTA is for offices only; need hygienist-specific CTA](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Ideation Strategies

  - [Explore hygienists' aspirational topics (e.g., owning practice, administering Botox)](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Focus on "primal needs/wants" of hygienists](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Nate to provide list of similar vertical companies (e.g., nutritionists, retail workers) for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Analyze SEO strategies of companies in similar spaces but different industries](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### W2 Article and Keyword Research

  - [W2 article in pipeline for next week](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Nate to provide call recordings for keyword analysis](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Need to identify related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### HubSpot Data and Conversion Tracking

  - [Currently no specific blog conversion dashboards in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [No conversion panels on blog pages yet](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Potential savings: 3 hygienist sign-ups could save $1,200 in ad spend](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### Paid Advertising

  - [Recently started running paid ads](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Seeing increase in dental office inbounds (150/month)](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Kyle offered to review current paid strategy and provide insights](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Ad agency recommendation came from Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/_guLymqf7uwdard12cVMAz67pUboFtyD?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
